rationale: Keep: the citing paper’s note explicitly states it “extends Song and Chintagunta (2007)” by adding cross-category incidence effects and a nonhomothetic utility, indicating direct methodological dependence rather than a generic mention. The cited paper is a core discrete–continuous multicategory incidence/brand-choice/quantity framework that closely matches the citing paper’s central model components, and the reference is supported by an exact DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.44.4.595).
